subject: Re: catch-up
body:
I'M GLAD.  I mentioned the plan bcs.  I was told by the  sony salesman that  
it can be "fragile" so watch it  on the airplane  or overhead  cabin . there 
was no other case offered for it  .
Keep in touch 
a hug  (I need one too )
Marcia M.
